welcome.title: Your game starts with SporHive
welcome.subtitle: Book venues, explore academies, and unlock your player journey in one premium app.

entry.title: How would you like to continue?

public.title: Continue as Public User
public.desc: Browse venues and discover academies before creating a full player account.

player.title: Sign in as Player
player.desc: Access your player portal, bookings, and academy tools with your secure account.

entry.notSure: Not sure yet? Start as Public
entry.footerHint: You can switch your mode later from settings.

auth.title: Sign In
auth.description: Authentication route is configured for backend integration.

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your SporHive journey.
login.modeLocked: Mode is locked based on your selected entry path.
login.modeLockedHint: You are continuing as {{mode}} based on your entry selection.
login.redirectHint: You will be redirected to your requested page after login.
login.playerAccountHint: Player accounts are provided by your academy.

signup.title: Create Public Account
signup.subtitle: Register to unlock academy discovery and booking.

reset.title: Reset Password
reset.subtitle: Follow the secure verification flow to recover access.
reset.otpHint: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone.
reset.publicSuccessSubtitle: Your password has been reset successfully. You can now sign in.
reset.generatedPasswordHint: Save this password securely before continuing.

messages.otpSent: If the account exists, a verification code was sent.
messages.copyUnavailable: Copy is unavailable on this device. Long press to copy manually.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.network: Network issue. Please check your connection.
errors.server: Server issue. Please try again in a moment.
errors.loginFailed: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
errors.signupFailed: Unable to create account. Please try again.
errors.resetRequestFailed: Unable to send verification code. Please try again.
errors.resetConfirmFailed: Unable to reset password. Please try again.
errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. Please check your details.
errors.academyNotConfigured: This academy is not configured yet.
errors.phoneAlreadyRegistered: This phone number is already registered.
errors.resetContextMissing: Please request a new verification code and try again.
errors.phoneInvalid: Please enter a valid phone number.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.

public.title: Public Discovery Home
public.description: Public browsing route is ready for venue and academy discovery modules.

player.title: Player Portal Home
player.description: Player route shell is ready for authenticated portal modules.

booking.title: Booking Hub
booking.description: Booking routes are protected and ready for integration.
